title: Luke Hall - Minister of State for Skills, Apprenticeships and Higher Education, Department for Education - advice under the government's Business Appointment Rules
body: "Mr Hall received advice from the Independent Adviser on Ministerial Standards on taking up an appointment with Charity Tax Group. The advice was provided in December 2025 and the appointment was taken up later that month.  Mr Hall received advice from the Independent Adviser on Ministerial Standards on his independent consultancy. The advice was provided in October 2025 and the appointment was taken up later that month.  ACOBA published on its website advice provided to Luke Hall before its closure. "
